song_name: Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart

versions.song_name: Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart
Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Try Sleeping with a Broken Heart" - Alicia Keys
Chords by Joan's Genius 2010


Verse 1:
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
 Even if you were a million miles away, I could still feel you in my bed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Near me, touch me, feel me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
  And even at the bottom of the sea, I could still hear inside my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
  Tellin' me, touch me, feel me [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
  And all the time you were tellin' me lies[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
So tonight, I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
   I'm gonna hold on to the times we had [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                            [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Have you ever tried sleeping with a broken heart, well you could try sleeping in my bed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
  Lonely, own me, nobody ever shut it down like you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]Dm[/ch]
 You wore the crown, you made my body feel heaven bound[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Why don't you hold me, near me, I thought you told me, you'd never leave me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Looking in the sky I could see your face and I know right where I fit in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
   Take me, make me, you know that I'll always be [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
In love with you right til the end ooh[/tab]

(repeat Chorus)


Bridge:
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                       [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Anybody could've told you right from the start it's about to fall apart[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
So rather than hold on to a broken dream or just hold on to love[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
And I could find a way to make it, don't hold on too tight[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I'll make it without you tonight [/tab]

(repeat Chorus)
